title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures through skills, plugins, and MCP configuration. The toolkit enables agents to deploy infrastructure like Lambda and API Gateway with guardrails and auditability via CloudTrail.
